phrases.cultural_note: Open kitchens are common in traditional Lisbon seafood restaurants, allowing diners to watch chefs prepare fresh seafood.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's in the main dining hall.

responses.english: Good morning, it's in the main dining hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica na sala principal.

likely_response.local: O caixa fica perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is the cash register? The cash register is near the exit.

responses.english: Where is the cash register? The cash register is near the exit.
responses.phonetic: AW KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.local: O caixa fica perto da saída.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a cozinha aberta?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH koo-ZEE-nyuh uh-BEH-ruh-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The open kitchen allows guests to watch chefs prepare classic dishes like bacalhau à brás in real time.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, visível da sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, vee-ZEE-vehl DUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, visible from the main dining hall.

responses.english: Good morning, visible from the main dining hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, vee-ZEE-vehl DUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, visível da sala principal.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pay for my meal?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment is processed at a central counter due to the high customer volume and pay-at-counter system.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cashier.

responses.english: You can pay at the cashier.

phrases.text_local: Onde estão localizados os tanques de marisco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-doosh OOSH TAHNNG-kihsh DIH muh-REESH-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh seafood is kept alive in visible tanks, a traditional Lisbon practice ensuring quality and transparency.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na sala principal, ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL, OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the main hall, at the back.

responses.english: Good morning, in the main hall, at the back.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL, OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, na sala principal, ao fundo.

phrases.cultural_note: The open kitchen design emphasizes culinary transparency and the bustling atmosphere typical of Ramiro.

likely_response.local: Ao fundo da sala principal, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo DUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The open kitchen is in the main dining hall, where you can see the chefs working.

responses.english: The open kitchen is in the main dining hall, where you can see the chefs working.
responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo DUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.local: Ao fundo da sala principal, à esquerda.
